task_goal: Delete the file Qigo_active_house.mp3 from the Android filesystem located in the Alarms folder within the sdk_gphone_x86_64 storage area.
task_goal_rewrite: The file Qigo_active_house.mp3 is permanently deleted from the Alarms folder within the shared external storage (canonically accessed as /sdcard) of the Android device.

checkpoints.description: The file Qigo_active_house.mp3 is visible in the Alarms folder within the device's shared external storage (canonically /sdcard).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace output showing Qigo_active_house.mp3 listed in the Alarms folder of the device's storage prior to deletion actions.

checkpoints.description: The file Qigo_active_house.mp3 is no longer present in the Alarms folder within the device's shared external storage (canonically /sdcard).
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot or trace output confirming Qigo_active_house.mp3 is not listed in the Alarms folder of the device's storage after deletion actions are completed.

checkpoints.description: Evidence confirms the operation was applied to the exact target object/value and intended context stated in the goal.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Use screenshot/UI text/action evidence to disambiguate the target identity and location before final-state verification.

success_rule: Success is achieved if both required checkpoints are satisfied: the target file was located in the specified Alarms folder and is no longer present there after deletion actions.
